title: > Analyze the text for:
content:
> Analyze the text for:
> * Evidence Quality: Are claims supported by data, facts, or examples? Note where citations or proof are missing.
> * Argument Clarity: Is the "thesis" distinct? Are the supporting points organized hierarchically?
> * Persuasiveness: specific suggestions to make the rational argument harder to refute (e.g., "Add a statistic here," or "Cite a case study there").
> Content to Review:
> [INSERT CONTENT HERE]
>
Step 4: Pathos Review
Purpose: Evaluate the emotional resonance and appeal to the audience.
> Prompt:
> Act as an Audience Psychologist and Storyteller. Your task is to conduct a "Pathos Review" (Appeal to Emotion). You must evaluate how the content connects with the reader on a human level.
> Please provide:
> * Emotional Profile: What is the current emotional tone (e.g., cold, urgent, inspiring, detached)?
> * Resonance Check: Identify specific sentences that successfully evoke emotion and those that feel robotic or flat.
> * Engagement Strategy: Suggest 3 specific changes (e.g., metaphors, sensory language, or personal anecdotes) to increase empathy and engagement without losing professionalism.
context: From document: Here is a complete prompt chain designed for high-performance Large… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/7)
